scientific_question: In a two-site Z2 symmetry-breaking toy Hamiltonian used as a reduced Grand-Unification-Epoch-context model, what are the benchmark ground-state values of the order-parameter expectation, domain-wall density, transverse-coherence expectation, and effective-Hamiltonian expectation, and how accurately do exact local and noisy local estimator workflows reproduce them?

truncation.rationale: The experiment keeps two binary order-parameter sites in order to define the smallest exactly diagonalizable symmetry-breaking toy model that supports a reduced order parameter, a domain-wall diagnostic, and a transverse-coherence observable without claiming realistic grand-unified field-theory dynamics.
